purpose: Probe whether the direct forced-close exception line from the same Hadoop incident can sustain a usable control-link slot without collapsing the baselines.

cases.eligibility_note: Direct forced-close anchor for the same worker-RPC disruption incident. This is a red-team probe to determine whether the action slot is salvageable at all.
